Verse 14

world

kosmos = mankind. (See Scofield "Matthew 4:8").

Verse 27

Son of man

(See Scofield "Matthew 8:20").

Verse 33

world

kosmos = mankind. (See Scofield "Matthew 4:8").

Verse 51

world

kosmos = mankind. (See Scofield "Matthew 4:8").

Verse 69

we believe

Or, we have believed and come to understand that thou art the Holy One of God.

Verse 70

devil

(Greek - διάβολος," adversary, usually trans). Satan. Cf. (See Scofield "Revelation 20:10"). Also see, John 13:27.
